description: Assistant telephonique IA par equipe. Un locataire appelle un numero dedie, l'IA mene une conversation guidee (FR/NL/EN), extrait les infos, cree une intervention SEIDO avec PDF et notifie le gestionnaire. Stack: Telnyx + ElevenLabs Conversational AI + Vercel AI SDK + @react-pdf/renderer.

userStories.title: Schema DB + migrations
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the ai_phone_numbers, ai_phone_calls, ai_phone_usage tables created with RLS so that call data is stored securely.
acceptanceCriteria: Migration creates 3 tables with all indexes
Column phone added to users (if absent)
Column source added to interventions (if absent)
npm run supabase:types regenerates without error

userStories.title: Provisioning Telnyx (API)
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, I want to activate a phone number for my team so that tenants can call the AI assistant.
acceptanceCriteria: Server action provisionPhoneNumber(teamId) provisions a Belgian number via Telnyx API
Server action deprovisionPhoneNumber(teamId) releases the number
Number stored in ai_phone_numbers with telnyx IDs
Error handling: number unavailable, identity verification

userStories.title: Configuration agent ElevenLabs
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a service that creates/configures an ElevenLabs agent per team so that each team has its own AI assistant with the agency name.
acceptanceCriteria: Service elevenlabs-agent.service.ts with createAgent, updateAgent, deleteAgent
TTS: Flash v2.5, neutral female voice

userStories.title: Webhook inbound call
userStories.description: As a system, I want a webhook endpoint that receives call results from ElevenLabs so that each call automatically creates an intervention.
acceptanceCriteria: Identifies tenant via caller phone lookup

userStories.title: Extraction structuree (AI SDK)
userStories.description: As a system, I want to extract structured info from a call transcript so that the intervention is created with accurate data.
acceptanceCriteria: Zod schema: title, description (FR), urgency, locationInUnit, categoryGuess, requiresQuote, tenantAvailability
Description ALWAYS generated in French (even if call was NL/EN)
Uses generateText from AI SDK with output schema
Unit tests with sample transcripts (FR, NL, EN)

userStories.title: Generation PDF rapport
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, I want a PDF report for each call so that I have a complete documentary trace.
acceptanceCriteria: Contains: header with SEIDO logo, structured summary, tenant info, full transcript, metadata
Service generateCallReportPDF stores PDF in Supabase Storage (documents bucket)
Creates intervention_documents entry linked to intervention

userStories.title: Email recap gestionnaire
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, I want to receive an email with the call summary and PDF attachment so that I'm informed even when not on the app.
acceptanceCriteria: Contains: structured summary, link to intervention, PDF attached
Uses existing Resend email notification system

userStories.title: Page parametres telephone IA
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, I want a settings page to activate/deactivate the AI phone number so that I can manage this feature.
acceptanceCriteria: Monthly stats: calls count, interventions created

userStories.title: Historique des appels
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, I want to see the history of all calls received by the assistant so that I can track activity and find specific calls.
acceptanceCriteria: List with: date, time, duration, tenant name, summary, status

userStories.title: Badge AI dans intervention
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, I want to see a visual indicator when an intervention was created by the phone assistant so that I know the request origin.
acceptanceCriteria: Badge 'Created by phone assistant' in intervention detail view

userStories.title: Compteur de minutes + usage
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, I want to see my real-time minutes usage so that I can anticipate overages.
acceptanceCriteria: Shows: minutes used/60, calls count, overage cost

userStories.title: Stripe add-on billing
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, I want the AI phone plan billed via Stripe so that billing is automated.
acceptanceCriteria: New Stripe Price (metered) for phone AI add-on
Usage records sent to Stripe end of month

userStories.title: Integration E2E test
userStories.description: As a developer, I want integration tests that validate the full flow so that the system is reliable in production.
acceptanceCriteria: Test: webhook inbound → intervention created → PDF generated
Test: caller ID match → tenant identified
Test: unknown caller → intervention created with flag
Test: structured extraction with FR, NL, EN transcripts
